Incident Report — Brackenhill Capital plc (Company No. 09345678; FCA FRN 932847) — Cyber/Operational Event dated 05 June 2026.
At 07:42 BST, Ms Elodie Paterson, Head of IT Risk, observed anomalous SFTP activity affecting the RNS drafting workspace for Mallowdune plc, a UK issuer on the Main Market.
The workspace included draft text for a pre‑close update; information was controlled as inside information under Article 17 UK MAR, but no MNPI was transmitted externally.
We isolated the segment and notified Compliance (role-only) and the Head of Dealing; incident channel: security@brackenhill-capital.co.uk and s e c u r i t y @ brackenhill- capital.co.uk.
Contact number for the incident bridge: +44 20 3850 7391; do not use the public helpline 0800 000 1234 for internal escalations.
Registered office: 3rd Floor, Avalon House, 17 Barley Court, Lundenford, ZX1 4ZZ; issuer client file ref https://portal.brackenhill-capital.co.uk/tickets/INC-2026-00731?user=ms.paterson%40brackenhill-capital.co.uk.
Banking details were stored but not exfiltrated: A/c Name Brackenhill Capital plc; Sort 09-99-01; A c c o u n t No. 23847605; IBAN GB14 BRCL 099901 23847605 (checksum mismatch flagged in test vault).
Employee identifiers in the log include UK Passport No. 9Z4812053 for Mr Rowan Tyrell (redacted in export) and NI number QQ 12 34 56 C, stored only in hashed form.
Tax/VAT fields: VAT GB 123 4567 89 (invalid checksum placeholder) and UTR 12345 67890 for a dormant SPV, included in a template but not used for filings.
We have opened a clean-room environment; back-ups show no alteration of order-entry algorithms; we did not collect MAC addresses from staff laptops.
There is no evidence of client account movement, and no dealing took place; any trade restrictions remain active in the watch and restricted lists per MAR and FCA expectations.
For HR purposes, the affected contractor’s phone is +44 7700 912 345 and email hello.contractor@mall-owdune.example, but Name: [Employee Name] and Date of birth: [dd/mm/yyyy] appear only as generic form labels.
We lodged an initial incident notification via FCA Connect; this document is not an announcement draft and should not be treated as an RNS.
Under the Incident Response Plan v4.3, governance owners are the CISO and the Compliance Officer; project status: sprint-12 bugfix hardening, not a material acquisition or disposal.
Note: the customer service number printed on legacy stationery 0345 000 0000 routes to a switchboard and is not a personal number.
